name: MeinID.com (VW ID Forum)
tech_section_hint: Antrieb & Technik, Software & Updates, Häufige Probleme & Fehler (Wiki), ID.3/ID.4/ID.5/ID.7/ID.Buzz
notes: Dediziertes VW ID-Forum. WoltLab Suite, kein Login zum Lesen. 410k Posts, 172 Posts/Tag. Strukturierte Fehlercode-Wiki (z.B. B200049). Sehr wertvoll für moderne VW Elektrofahrzeuge.
risk: low-medium — WoltLab, public, well-structured wiki for fault codes

name: Motor-Talk (VW Sektion)
tech_section_hint: Pro Modell (Golf, Passat, Polo, Tiguan…) je dediziertes Technifk/Fehler/Reparatur Unterforum
notes: VW-Sektion des größten deutschen KFZ-Forums (63M+ Posts gesamt). Kein Login zum Lesen. Proprietäre Software — Codex Phase 0 soll Struktur und Parser-Typ identifizieren. Massives Datenvolumen.
risk: medium — proprietary software unknown, but volume is unmatched

name: AudiDrivers.de
tech_section_hint: Motor, Turbo, Fahrwerk/Räder, Bremsen, Elektrik/Elektronik
notes: phpBB 3, kein Login. 200k+ Posts, 16k Threads. Sehr strukturiert mit dedizierten Technik-Sektionen. Hohe Fehler→Lösung-Dichte. Niedrigstes Risiko in der Liste.

name: PeugeotForum.de
tech_section_hint: Panne, Fehler, Elektrik, Wartung — nach Modell sortiert
notes: phpBB, kein Login. 885k Posts, 102k Threads, 31k Mitglieder. Einer der aktivsten deutschen Marken-Foren. Explizite Fehler-Sektionen pro Modell.
risk: low — phpBB, public, very high volume

name: German Car Forum
tech_section_hint: Per-brand technical subforums, Problems & Solutions sections
notes: XenForo, kein Login. 2,85M Posts seit 2005. Englischsprachig aber europäisch fokussiert. Alle deutschen Marken vertreten. XenForo bestens unterstützt.

name: BMW-Syndikat
tech_section_hint: Codierung/Diagnose/Programmierung, Motoren, modellspezifische Foren (E30–G20)
notes: 3,1M Posts, 313k Mitglieder, kein Login. Forum-Software unklar (legacy custom). Hervorragend für BMW-Fehlerdiagnose. Codex Phase 0 bestimmt Software.
risk: medium — software unknown, volume justifies the attempt

name: C4Forum.de
tech_section_hint: Fehler - Mängel - Probleme, Motor, Elektronik, Wartung/Reparatur
notes: phpBB 3, öffentlich. 159k Posts, aktiv bis 2026. Explizite 'Fehler/Mängel/Probleme'-Sektion. Kleineres Forum aber hohe Qualität.

name: Fiat-Forum.de
tech_section_hint: Motor, Elektrik/Elektronik, Getriebe, modellspezifische Boards
notes: WoltLab Suite. 63k Posts, 23k Mitglieder. Ähnliche HTML-Struktur wie phpBB — generic Parser + Codex Phase 0 sollte ausreichen.

name: RenaultForum.net
tech_section_hint: Elektronik, Mechanik, Multimedia — nach Modell
notes: WoltLab, aktiv bis März 2026. Spezialisierte Renault-Community. Gastlesezugang wahrscheinlich verfügbar.

name: PeugeotTalk.de
tech_section_hint: PSA Motoren-Talk, Diagbox/PP2000 Diagnostik, Tuning/TÜV
notes: WoltLab, PSA-Gruppe. Besonderer Fokus auf Diagnose-Software (Diagbox) — sehr wertvolle OBD-Code-Threads.
risk: medium — WoltLab, PSA diagnostic focus is valuable

name: VWVortex
tech_section_hint: Model-specific forums, GTI / Golf, Passat, Tiguan, Atlas, electrical and drivetrain troubleshooting
notes: Public XenForo-based VW/Audi forum with deep technical archives. Live HTTP probe returned 200 and forum list HTML.
risk: low — XenForo, public, fetchable without JS challenge in basic probe

name: Audizine Audi Enthusiast Forums
tech_section_hint: A4 / A6 / Q-series model forums, maintenance, electrical, engine, driveline
notes: Audi-focused forum; live curl probe returned the XenForo forum list and public metadata from the homepage.
risk: low-medium — XenForo, public, but web access varies by client

name: Audi-Sport.net
tech_section_hint: Model-specific technical forums, faults, servicing, engine, transmission, diagnostics
notes: Large Audi enthusiast forum with public XenForo markup in the live probe. Good complement to German Audi sources.

name: BRISKODA
tech_section_hint: Model technical forums, diagnostics, electrical, engine and gearbox issues
notes: Public Invision forum for Skoda owners and fans. Live probe returned homepage metadata and Invision attributes.

name: SwedeSpeed
tech_section_hint: Volvo model forums, maintenance, drivetrain, electronics, troubleshooting
notes: Public Volvo forum on XenForo/Fora-style stack. Live HTTP probe returned 200 and XenForo markers.

name: Volvo Owners Club Forum
tech_section_hint: Volvo technical sections, diagnostics, servicing, engine and electrical discussions
notes: Public Volvo owners forum. Live probe returned vBulletin metadata in the homepage HTML.
risk: low-medium — vBulletin, public, generic parser path may need calibration

name: ToyotaNation
tech_section_hint: Model forums, engine and transmission issues, hybrid systems, maintenance troubleshooting
notes: Large public Toyota forum with XenForo markers and successful 200 probe. High volume of solved problem threads.

name: Vauxhall Owners Network
tech_section_hint: Model and engine forums, maintenance, electrical, drivetrain and fault discussions
notes: Public Vauxhall/Opel forum. Live probe returned 200 and XenForo forum-list markup.

name: Subaru Outback Forums
tech_section_hint: Outback / Legacy troubleshooting, CVT, AWD, electrical and maintenance threads
notes: Public Subaru forum with XenForo-style forum index and successful live 200 probe.

name: TorqueCars Car Forums
tech_section_hint: Engine, ECU, tuning, drivability, fault-finding and modification troubleshooting
notes: Public multi-brand XenForo forum. Not as cleanly repair-only as owner clubs, but the live probe shows accessible issue/advice structure.
risk: medium — multi-brand, more mixed tuning content, but fetchable and technically oriented
